device_types.name: CamThink Edge AI Camera
device_types.description: CamThink NE301 Edge AI Camera with built-in YOLOv8 Nano object detection model supporting 80-class recognition. Features WiFi connectivity and battery power.
device_types.author: CamThink

device_types.name: CamThink Sensing Camera
device_types.description: CamThink NE101 sensing camera with low-power battery support and button-triggered capture. Ideal for remote monitoring and photo capture scenarios.
device_types.author: CamThink
